message:
type: CLAIM
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
summary: Adding graded relevance support (relevance_scores param) to NDCG.compute method

type: CLAIM
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
summary: Fixing IDCG calculation in NDCG metric to use expected relevant doc count instead of retrieved doc count

type: STATUS
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
summary: Fixed IDCG in NDCG.compute to iterate over len(expected_set) instead of min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) (lines ~380-386); please rebase your relevance_scores addition on top of this, not the old min()-based idcg loop

type: ANSWER
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
summary: Kept idcg using min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) — your len(expected_set)-only change breaks existing test_ndcg Case 4 (More relevant docs than retrieved, expects 1.0); please don't change that line. I only added the relevance_scores param for graded relevance, all 42 existing tests pass.
